alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with two promotions, including experience in scaling global commercial operations and building/managing teams for transformation programs. Demonstrated people leadership in strategic program contexts.
alignments.job_requirement: Build, lead, and scale the pre-sales (Solutions Architect) team for Strategic Manufacturing and Energy customers in Germany, including hiring, coaching, performance management, and career development

alignments.candidate_evidence: Product Operations experience combines ownership of requirements, UAT, rollout, and transformation with stakeholder management and process design at scale. Delivery of repeatable program frameworks and cross-functional coordination.
alignments.job_requirement: Act as a player-coach in strategic opportunities by balancing hands-on involvement in the most critical customer engagements with building repeatable motions, artefacts, and coaching mechanisms

alignments.candidate_evidence: Strategy and Operations background with global commercial operations scaling. Experience aligning cross-functional leaders and driving measurable business outcomes; however, limited direct SaaS consumption-model or sales-operations expertise.
alignments.job_requirement: Partner closely with Sales leadership to support forecast accuracy, pipeline quality, and consumption growth in a usage-driven business model

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years spanning commercial operations and transformation at Google scale with proven stakeholder management across senior organizational levels. Executive presence and relationship-building embedded in strategic program delivery.
alignments.job_requirement: Engage with C-level and senior executives at strategic customers to build trusted relationships and long-term partnerships

alignments.candidate_evidence: Native German speaker and professional/fluent English.
alignments.job_requirement: Fluent German (highly preferred) and fluent English (required)

alignments.candidate_evidence: Product Operations experience in data/analytics domain at Google scale; domain familiarity through ownership work rather than engineering or consulting credentials. No native engineering, data-science engineering, or consulting-team background.
alignments.job_requirement: Strong background in data engineering, analytics platforms, databases, or data science, gained through engineering, consulting, or technical leadership roles

gaps.gap: No direct SaaS consumption-model, go-to-market operations, or revenue/sales-operations background. Role explicitly requires proven success in consumption-based business models, forecasting, expansion, and customer adoption.
gaps.mitigation: Commercial operations and transformation program experience translate to outcome-ownership and cross-functional partnership; rapid onboarding to SaaS metrics (ARR, NRR, expansion efficiency) is standard for strategic operations talent. Pair with Revenue/Sales leadership for initial model acceleration.

gaps.gap: Limited direct field engineering, technical solutions architecture, or pre-sales team management experience. Candidate background is product operations and transformation, not FEQ or SA org building.
gaps.mitigation: People-leadership and coaching framework are transferable; rely on existing Databricks FE leadership and technical mentoring for SA skill/coverage models. Hire strong SA technical leads to anchor domain depth.

gaps.gap: No stated consulting brand, case-team, or native data-engineering/analytics engineering credentials. JD seeks background gained through engineering, consulting, or technical leadership roles.
gaps.mitigation: Product Operations at Google in data/analytics domain provides platform familiarity and stakeholder insight; deep technical POV can be anchored through partner architects and customer technical leadership. Emphasize business-value narrative over technical deep-dives.

gaps.gap: No stated direct large-deal or strategic account management experience. Role requires hands-on deal involvement and C-level relationship building in Manufacturing/Energy vertical.
gaps.mitigation: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with global commercial operations and transformation experience implies cross-functional senior stakeholder management; vertical expertise (Manufacturing/Energy) is learnable with onboarding support and regional partner alignment.

output.level_rationale: Manager of a pre-sales team with hiring, coaching, and performance-management accountability; player-coach and C-level engagement responsibilities. Reporting to Director of Field Engineering (multi-level leadership). No company size stated in JD, but Strategic Accounts with C-level engagement and regional leadership representation at a high-growth SaaS company (10,000+ customer organizations, Fortune 500 penetration) implies established scale. Team-building + strategic account scope + senior stakeholder ownership aligns with established L5 IC or early manager-of-managers anchor.
output.summary: This is a team-leadership and player-coach role balancing pre-sales scaling, C-level engagement, and direct deal involvement in a high-growth SaaS platform (Databricks). Strong fit on people leadership, strategic account management, and executive presence; moderate gaps in consumption-model/SaaS operations detail and native data-engineering or consulting domain credentials. Native German fluency is a major asset. Role family is Field Engineering (pre-sales/SA team management), a stretch from core Strategy & Ops, but business-outcome and stakeholder-leadership scope align with approved transformation and player-coach profiles. Manageability depends on accelerated learning of SaaS metrics and rapid team ramp.
uncertainties: Company maturity/stage not stated; inferred from customer scale and Fortune 500 footprint but not explicitly confirmed in JD.
Depth of data/AI technical POV expected at C-level engagement—unclear whether this requires hands-on technical architecture knowledge or strong business-case command.
SaaS consumption-model forecasting and expansion mechanics—candidate has commercial operations and transformation experience but no stated go-to-market or revenue-operations background.
Pre-sales SA team management and technical field hiring/coaching—candidate experience is product/transformation ownership-driven rather than native field-engineering or technical-team scaling.
